# Tell me about yourself*Created: Sunday, December 21, 2025 at 9:03:10?PM*<ul>
<li>Tell me about yourself </li>
<li>Two or three minutes - give them about me - ideal candidate </li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
<ol>
<li>Product team are responsible - design and engineering to build - prototype and features </li>
<li>Pmm role - insights and the needs of the customer and build the lot value of what they are building - inbound - research and develop the roadmap </li>
<li>Hand it off to outbound Pmm - go market it </li>
<li>Not enough time for marketing plans </li>
</ol>
